content:
# Spectral Gamma Ray

**Summary**: Gamma-ray logging measuring uranium, potassium, and thorium to identify lithology.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2013-abdalla|Abdalla, 2013]] used SGR logs to define stratigraphic cycles via Artificial Neural Network and Fischer Plot analysis.

- [[2017-mohammed-2|Mohammed, 2017]] used SGR to identify lithofacies, correlate stratigraphic sequences, and reconstruct paleoenvironments.

## Instruments and Software



- [[2017-mohammed-2|Mohammed, 2017]] used SGR to identify lithofacies, correlate stratigraphic sequences, and reconstruct paleoenvironments.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Identified 44 cycles in the Arab-D succession using SGR data. ([[2013-abdalla|Abdalla, 2013, p. 80]])

- Used as a tool for correlation based on SGR to provide a better regional correlation guide. ([[2017-mohammed-2|Mohammed, 2017, p. 20]])
